commands.review_summary:
The PR adds reusable `package-publish.yml` inputs for caller-uploaded prebuilt ClawPack `.tgz` artifacts, downloads/resolves the artifact, extracts it for validation, and publishes the `.tgz` through the existing CLI path.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows artifact mode turns the CLI source into a local `.tgz` while the workflow can still append only `--source-ref`, and current main's CLI rejects partial source metadata without repo and commit.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can address the source metadata blocker, safe archive validation, and focused workflow tests without a broader product decision.

target.title: feat: support prebuilt package publish artifacts
target.body:
## Summary
- add optional prebuilt ClawPack artifact inputs to the reusable `package-publish.yml` workflow
- download and resolve the caller-uploaded `.tgz`, extract it for `clawhub package validate`, then publish the `.tgz` through the existing CLI path
- reject `source_path` with artifact mode so callers do not mix source-folder and prepacked publish semantics

## Tests
- `bunx vitest run src/__tests__/package-publish-workflow.test.ts`
- `bun run ci:static`
target.author: patrick-erichsen
